articles.title: 'Oil Prices Are Tumbling, World Is Safer': Trump Claims Historic Hormuz Shipping Record
articles.description: US President Donald Trump claimed a record 19 million barrels of oil passed through the Strait of Hormuz after a new US-Iran diplomatic understanding. He hailed falling oil prices, an open shipping route, and progress in nuclear negotiations, even as tensions with Israel persist.

articles.title: Trump Flags 'Record' 19 Million-Barrel Hormuz Oil Flow, Cheers Lower Prices: 'The World Is A Much Safer P
articles.description: President Donald Trump says a record 19 million barrels passed through Hormuz, helping drive oil prices lower and easing market fears.

articles.title: Oil slide anchors India 10-year yield at 3-month low
articles.description: Indian government bond yields dipped to a three-month low on Tuesday, buoyed by easing oil prices and receding geopolitical tensions. The benchmark 10-year note closed lower as market anxiety subsided. Analysts anticipate yields to remain within a narrow band this week. Meanwhile, anticipation builds for a potential inclusion in a global index, which could boost foreign investment and the rupee, despite ongoing El Nino concerns impacting inflation and growth.

articles.title: Putin says Ukrainian infrastructure attacks are an attempt to destabilise Russia
articles.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin accused Ukraine of targeting civilian infrastructure to destabilise Russian society, amid increased attacks on oil refineries and rising gasoline prices.
